tEn: Deep Unsupervised Learning using Nonequilibrium Thermodynamics
tZh: 基于非平衡热力学的深度无监督学习
sEn: A novel generative model inspired by non-equilibrium statistical physics that learns to reverse a diffusion process to restore data structure.
sZh: 受非平衡统计物理启发，通过逆向扩散过程恢复数据结构，实现灵活且可处理的深度生成模型。
absEn: A central problem in machine learning involves modeling complex data-sets using highly flexible families of probability distributions in which learning, sampling, inference, and evaluation are still analytically or computationally tractable. Here, we develop an approach that simultaneously achieves both flexibility and tractability. The essential idea, inspired by non-equilibrium statistical physics, is to systematically and slowly destroy structure in a data distribution through an iterative forward diffusion process. We then learn a reverse diffusion process that restores structure in data, yielding a highly flexible and tractable generative model of the data. This approach allows us to rapidly learn, sample from, and evaluate probabilities in deep generative models with thousands of layers or time steps, as well as to compute conditional and posterior probabilities under the learned model. We additionally release an open source reference implementation of the algorithm.
absZh: 机器学习的一个核心问题是如何使用高度灵活的概率分布族对复杂数据集进行建模，同时保持学习、采样、推理和评估在分析或计算上的可处理性。本文提出了一种同时实现灵活性和可处理性的方法。其基本思想受非平衡统计物理启发，通过迭代前向扩散过程系统地、缓慢地破坏数据分布中的结构。然后，我们学习一个逆向扩散过程来恢复数据中的结构，从而得到一个高度灵活且可处理的生成模型。该方法使我们能够快速学习、采样和评估具有数千层或时间步的深度生成模型中的概率，还能计算学习模型下的条件概率和后验概率。此外，我们还发布了该算法的开源参考实现。

contrib.en: Introduces diffusion probabilistic models inspired by non-equilibrium statistical physics, achieving both flexibility and tractability.
contrib.zh: 受非平衡统计物理启发，提出扩散概率模型，同时实现灵活性与可处理性。

contrib.en: Defines a forward diffusion process that gradually destroys data structure and learns a reverse process to restore it.
contrib.zh: 定义前向扩散过程逐步破坏数据结构，并学习反向过程恢复结构。

contrib.en: Enables exact sampling, log-likelihood evaluation, and multiplication with other distributions for posterior computation.
contrib.zh: 支持精确采样、对数似然评估，以及与其他分布相乘计算后验。

contrib.en: Demonstrates high log-likelihood on diverse datasets including MNIST, CIFAR-10, and dead leaves images.
contrib.zh: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10和枯叶图像等多个数据集上展示高对数似然。

contrib.en: Provides entropy bounds for the reverse diffusion process and a lower bound on log-likelihood for training.
contrib.zh: 为反向扩散过程提供熵界，并为训练提供对数似然下界。

contrib.en: Releases open-source reference implementation for reproducibility.
contrib.zh: 发布开源参考实现以促进可复现性。

limits.en: Requires many diffusion steps (thousands) for high-quality samples, increasing computational cost.
limits.zh: 需要大量扩散步骤（数千步）以获得高质量样本，增加计算成本。

limits.en: Performance depends on the choice of diffusion schedule and noise type (Gaussian or binomial).
limits.zh: 性能依赖于扩散调度和噪声类型（高斯或二项式）的选择。

limits.en: The method assumes smooth target distributions; highly multimodal or discontinuous distributions may be challenging.
limits.zh: 该方法假设目标分布平滑；高度多峰或不连续分布可能具有挑战性。

limits.en: Training requires careful tuning of hyperparameters like step size and network architecture.
limits.zh: 训练需要仔细调整超参数，如步长和网络架构。

limits.en: The lower bound on log-likelihood may be loose for finite diffusion steps, affecting model evaluation.
limits.zh: 对于有限扩散步数，对数似然下界可能较松，影响模型评估。

items.en: A central problem in machine learning involves modeling complex data-sets using highly flexible families of probability distributions in which learning, sampling, inference, and evaluation are still analytically or computationally tractable. Here, we develop an approach that simultaneously achieves both flexibility and tractability. The essential idea, inspired by non-equilibrium statistical physics, is to systematically and slowly destroy structure in a data distribution through an iterative forward diffusion process. We then learn a reverse diffusion process that restores structure in data, yielding a highly flexible and tractable generative model of the data. This approach allows us to rapidly learn, sample from, and evaluate probabilities in deep generative models with thousands of layers or time steps, as well as to compute conditional and posterior probabilities under the learned model. We additionally release an open source reference implementation of the algorithm.
items.zh: 机器学习中的一个核心问题涉及使用高度灵活的概率分布族对复杂数据集进行建模，其中学习、采样、推理和评估在分析或计算上仍然易于处理。在此，我们开发了一种同时实现灵活性和可处理性的方法。受非平衡统计物理学的启发，其基本思想是通过迭代前向扩散过程系统地、缓慢地破坏数据分布中的结构。然后，我们学习一个恢复数据结构的反向扩散过程，从而产生一个高度灵活且易于处理的数据生成模型。这种方法使我们能够快速学习、采样和评估具有数千层或时间步长的深度生成模型中的概率，以及计算所学模型下的条件概率和后验概率。我们还发布了该算法的开源参考实现。

items.en: Historically, probabilistic models suffer from a tradeoff between two conflicting objectives: tractability and flexibility. Models that are tractable can be analytically evaluated and easily fit to data (e.g. a Gaussian or Laplace). However, these models are unable to aptly describe structure in rich datasets. On the other hand, models that are flexible can be molded to fit structure in arbitrary data. For example, we can define models in terms of any (non-negative) function ϕ​(𝐱)italic-ϕ𝐱\phi(\mathbf{x}) yielding the flexible distribution p​(𝐱)=ϕ​(𝐱)Z𝑝𝐱italic-ϕ𝐱𝑍p\left(\mathbf{x}\right)=\frac{\phi\left(\mathbf{x}\right)}{Z}, where Z𝑍Z is a normalization constant. However, computing this normalization constant is generally intractable. Evaluating, training, or drawing samples from such flexible models typically requires a very expensive Monte Carlo process.
items.zh: 历史上，概率模型在可处理性和灵活性这两个相互冲突的目标之间面临权衡。可处理的模型可以进行分析评估并轻松拟合数据（例如高斯分布或拉普拉斯分布）。然而，这些模型无法很好地描述丰富数据集中的结构。另一方面，灵活的模型可以塑形以拟合任意数据的结构。例如，我们可以根据任何（非负）函数 φ(x) 定义模型，得到灵活分布 p(x) = φ(x)/Z，其中 Z 是归一化常数。然而，计算这个归一化常数通常是难以处理的。评估、训练或从这种灵活模型中采样通常需要非常昂贵的蒙特卡洛过程。

items.en: A variety of analytic approximations exist which ameliorate, but do not remove, this tradeoff–for instance mean field theory and its expansions (T, 1982; Tanaka, 1998), variational Bayes (Jordan et al., 1999), contrastive divergence (Welling & Hinton, 2002; Hinton, 2002), minimum probability flow (Sohl-Dickstein et al., 2011b, a), minimum KL contraction (Lyu, 2011), proper scoring rules (Gneiting & Raftery, 2007; Parry et al., 2012), score matching (Hyvärinen, 2005), pseudolikelihood (Besag, 1975), loopy belief propagation (Murphy et al., 1999), and many, many more. Non-parametric methods (Gershman & Blei, 2012) can also be very effective111Non-parametric methods can be seen as transitioning smoothly between tractable and flexible models. For instance, a non-parametric Gaussian mixture model will represent a small amount of data using a single Gaussian, but may represent infinite data as a mixture of an infinite number of Gaussians..
items.zh: 存在多种分析近似方法可以改善但并未消除这种权衡——例如平均场理论及其展开（T, 1982; Tanaka, 1998）、变分贝叶斯（Jordan et al., 1999）、对比散度（Welling & Hinton, 2002; Hinton, 2002）、最小概率流（Sohl-Dickstein et al., 2011b, a）、最小 KL 收缩（Lyu, 2011）、适当评分规则（Gneiting & Raftery, 2007; Parry et al., 2012）、分数匹配（Hyvärinen, 2005）、伪似然（Besag, 1975）、环状置信传播（Murphy et al., 1999）等等。非参数方法（Gershman & Blei, 2012）也非常有效。

items.en: We present a novel way to define probabilistic models that allows:
items.zh: 我们提出了一种定义概率模型的新方法，该方法允许：

items.en: easy multiplication with other distributions, e.g. in order to compute a posterior, and
items.zh: 易于与其他分布相乘，例如为了计算后验，以及

items.en: the model log likelihood, and the probability of individual states, to be cheaply evaluated.
items.zh: 模型对数似然和单个状态的概率可以廉价地评估。

items.en: Our method uses a Markov chain to gradually convert one distribution into another, an idea used in non-equilibrium statistical physics (Jarzynski, 1997) and sequential Monte Carlo (Neal, 2001). We build a generative Markov chain which converts a simple known distribution (e.g. a Gaussian) into a target (data) distribution using a diffusion process. Rather than use this Markov chain to approximately evaluate a model which has been otherwise defined, we explicitly define the probabilistic model as the endpoint of the Markov chain. Since each step in the diffusion chain has an analytically evaluable probability, the full chain can also be analytically evaluated.
items.zh: 我们的方法使用马尔可夫链逐步将一个分布转换为另一个分布，这一思想用于非平衡统计物理学（Jarzynski, 1997）和序贯蒙特卡洛（Neal, 2001）。我们构建了一个生成马尔可夫链，通过扩散过程将简单的已知分布（例如高斯分布）转换为目标（数据）分布。我们不是使用这个马尔可夫链来近似评估一个已经以其他方式定义的模型，而是明确地将概率模型定义为马尔可夫链的终点。由于扩散链中的每一步都具有可分析评估的概率，整个链也可以进行分析评估。

items.en: Learning in this framework involves estimating small perturbations to a diffusion process. Estimating small perturbations is more tractable than explicitly describing the full distribution with a single, non-analytically-normalizable, potential function. Furthermore, since a diffusion process exists for any smooth target distribution, this method can capture data distributions of arbitrary form.
items.zh: 在这个框架中，学习涉及估计扩散过程的小扰动。估计小扰动比使用单个非分析可归一化的势函数显式描述完整分布更易于处理。此外，由于任何平滑的目标分布都存在扩散过程，该方法可以捕捉任意形式的数据分布。

items.en: We demonstrate the utility of these diffusion probabilistic models by training high log likelihood models for a two-dimensional swiss roll, binary sequence, handwritten digit (MNIST), and several natural image (CIFAR-10, bark, and dead leaves) datasets.
items.zh: 我们通过训练高对数似然模型来演示这些扩散概率模型的实用性，数据集包括二维瑞士卷、二进制序列、手写数字（MNIST）以及几个自然图像（CIFAR-10、树皮和枯叶）数据集。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The proposed modeling framework trained on 2-d swiss roll data. The top row shows time slices from the forward trajectory q​(𝐱(0​⋯​T))𝑞superscript𝐱0⋯𝑇q\left(\mathbf{x}^{(0\cdots T)}\right). The data distribution (left) undergoes Gaussian diffusion, which gradually transforms it into an identity-covariance Gaussian (right). The middle row shows the corresponding time slices from the trained reverse trajectory p​(𝐱(0​⋯​T))𝑝superscript𝐱0⋯𝑇p\left(\mathbf{x}^{(0\cdots T)}\right). An identity-covariance Gaussian (right) undergoes a Gaussian diffusion process with learned mean and covariance functions, and is gradually transformed back into the data distribution (left). The bottom row shows the drift term, 𝐟μ​(𝐱(t),t)−𝐱(t)subscript𝐟𝜇superscript𝐱𝑡𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{f}_{\mu}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)},t\right)-\mathbf{x}^{(t)}, for the same reverse diffusion process.
items.capZh: 图1：在二维瑞士卷数据上训练的所提出的建模框架。顶行显示了前向轨迹 q(x^(0...T)) 的时间切片。数据分布（左）经历高斯扩散，逐渐将其转换为单位协方差高斯分布（右）。中间行显示了训练后的反向轨迹 p(x^(0...T)) 的相应时间切片。单位协方差高斯分布（右）经历具有学习均值和协方差函数的高斯扩散过程，并逐渐转换回数据分布（左）。底行显示了相同反向扩散过程的漂移项 f_μ(x^(t), t) - x^(t)。

items.en: The wake-sleep algorithm (Hinton, 1995; Dayan et al., 1995) introduced the idea of training inference and generative probabilistic models against each other. This approach remained largely unexplored for nearly two decades, though with some exceptions (Sminchisescu et al., 2006; Kavukcuoglu et al., 2010). There has been a recent explosion of work developing this idea. In (Kingma & Welling, 2013; Gregor et al., 2013; Rezende et al., 2014; Ozair & Bengio, 2014) variational learning and inference algorithms were developed which allow a flexible generative model and posterior distribution over latent variables to be directly trained against each other.
items.zh: 醒眠算法（Hinton, 1995; Dayan et al., 1995）引入了训练推理和生成概率模型相互对抗的思想。这种方法在近二十年内基本未被探索，尽管有一些例外（Sminchisescu et al., 2006; Kavukcuoglu et al., 2010）。最近这方面的工作出现了爆炸性增长。在（Kingma & Welling, 2013; Gregor et al., 2013; Rezende et al., 2014; Ozair & Bengio, 2014）中，开发了变分学习和推理算法，允许灵活的生成模型和潜在变量的后验分布直接相互训练。

items.en: The variational bound in these papers is similar to the one used in our training objective and in the earlier work of (Sminchisescu et al., 2006). However, our motivation and model form are both quite different, and the present work retains the following differences and advantages relative to these techniques:
items.zh: 这些论文中的变分界与我们训练目标以及早期工作（Sminchisescu et al., 2006）中使用的类似。然而，我们的动机和模型形式都相当不同，并且当前工作相对于这些技术保留了以下差异和优势：

items.en: We develop our framework using ideas from physics, quasi-static processes, and annealed importance sampling rather than from variational Bayesian methods.
items.zh: 我们使用物理学、准静态过程和退火重要性采样的思想来开发我们的框架，而不是变分贝叶斯方法。

items.en: We show how to easily multiply the learned distribution with another probability distribution (eg with a conditional distribution in order to compute a posterior)
items.zh: 我们展示了如何轻松地将学习到的分布与另一个概率分布相乘（例如，与条件分布相乘以计算后验）。

items.en: We address the difficulty that training the inference model can prove particularly challenging in variational inference methods, due to the asymmetry in the objective between the inference and generative models. We restrict the forward (inference) process to a simple functional form, in such a way that the reverse (generative) process will have the same functional form.
items.zh: 我们解决了在变分推理方法中训练推理模型可能特别具有挑战性的问题，这是由于推理模型和生成模型之间目标的不对称性。我们将前向（推理）过程限制为简单的函数形式，使得反向（生成）过程具有相同的函数形式。

items.en: We train models with thousands of layers (or time steps), rather than only a handful of layers.
items.zh: 我们训练具有数千层（或时间步长）的模型，而不仅仅是少数几层。

items.en: We provide upper and lower bounds on the entropy production in each layer (or time step)
items.zh: 我们提供了每层（或时间步长）熵产的上界和下界。

items.en: There are a number of related techniques for training probabilistic models (summarized below) that develop highly flexible forms for generative models, train stochastic trajectories, or learn the reversal of a Bayesian network. Reweighted wake-sleep (Bornschein & Bengio, 2015) develops extensions and improved learning rules for the original wake-sleep algorithm. Generative stochastic networks (Bengio & Thibodeau-Laufer, 2013; Yao et al., 2014) train a Markov kernel to match its equilibrium distribution to the data distribution. Neural autoregressive distribution estimators (Larochelle & Murray, 2011) (and their recurrent (Uria et al., 2013a) and deep (Uria et al., 2013b) extensions) decompose a joint distribution into a sequence of tractable conditional distributions over each dimension. Adversarial networks (Goodfellow et al., 2014) train a generative model against a classifier which attempts to distinguish generated samples from true data. A similar objective in (Schmidhuber, 1992) learns a two-way mapping to a representation with marginally independent units. In (Rippel & Adams, 2013; Dinh et al., 2014) bijective deterministic maps are learned to a latent representation with a simple factorial density function. In (Stuhlmüller et al., 2013) stochastic inverses are learned for Bayesian networks. Mixtures of conditional Gaussian scale mixtures (MCGSMs) (Theis et al., 2012) describe a dataset using Gaussian scale mixtures, with parameters which depend on a sequence of causal neighborhoods. There is additionally significant work learning flexible generative mappings from simple latent distributions to data distributions – early examples including (MacKay, 1995) where neural networks are introduced as generative models, and (Bishop et al., 1998) where a stochastic manifold mapping is learned from a latent space to the data space. We will compare experimentally against adversarial networks and MCGSMs.
items.zh: 有许多相关技术用于训练概率模型（总结如下），这些技术开发了高度灵活的生成模型形式、训练随机轨迹或学习贝叶斯网络的逆过程。重新加权的醒眠算法（Bornschein & Bengio, 2015）为原始醒眠算法开发了扩展和改进的学习规则。生成随机网络（Bengio & Thibodeau-Laufer, 2013; Yao et al., 2014）训练马尔可夫核使其平衡分布与数据分布匹配。神经自回归分布估计器（Larochelle & Murray, 2011）（及其循环（Uria et al., 2013a）和深度（Uria et al., 2013b）扩展）将联合分布分解为每个维度上的一系列可处理的条件分布。对抗网络（Goodfellow et al., 2014）训练生成模型与试图区分生成样本和真实数据的分类器对抗。（Schmidhuber, 1992）中的类似目标学习到具有边际独立单元的表示的双向映射。在（Rippel & Adams, 2013; Dinh et al., 2014）中，学习双射确定性映射到具有简单因子密度函数的潜在表示。在（Stuhlmüller et al., 2013）中，学习贝叶斯网络的随机逆。条件高斯尺度混合（MCGSMs）（Theis et al., 2012）使用高斯尺度混合描述数据集，其参数依赖于一系列因果邻域。此外，还有大量工作学习从简单潜在分布到数据分布的灵活生成映射——早期例子包括（MacKay, 1995），其中神经网络被引入作为生成模型，以及（Bishop et al., 1998），其中学习从潜在空间到数据空间的随机流形映射。我们将在实验上与对抗网络和MCGSMs进行比较。

items.en: Related ideas from physics include the Jarzynski equality (Jarzynski, 1997), known in machine learning as Annealed Importance Sampling (AIS) (Neal, 2001), which uses a Markov chain which slowly converts one distribution into another to compute a ratio of normalizing constants. In (Burda et al., 2014) it is shown that AIS can also be performed using the reverse rather than forward trajectory. Langevin dynamics (Langevin, 1908), which are the stochastic realization of the Fokker-Planck equation, show how to define a Gaussian diffusion process which has any target distribution as its equilibrium. In (Suykens & Vandewalle, 1995) the Fokker-Planck equation is used to perform stochastic optimization. Finally, the Kolmogorov forward and backward equations (Feller, 1949) show that for many forward diffusion processes, the reverse diffusion processes can be described using the same functional form.
items.zh: 来自物理学的相关思想包括 Jarzynski 等式（Jarzynski, 1997），在机器学习中称为退火重要性采样（AIS）（Neal, 2001），它使用缓慢将一个分布转换为另一个分布的马尔可夫链来计算归一化常数的比率。在（Burda et al., 2014）中表明，AIS 也可以使用反向轨迹而不是前向轨迹进行。朗之万动力学（Langevin, 1908）是 Fokker-Planck 方程的随机实现，展示了如何定义以任何目标分布为平衡的高斯扩散过程。在（Suykens & Vandewalle, 1995）中，Fokker-Planck 方程用于执行随机优化。最后，Kolmogorov 正向和反向方程（Feller, 1949）表明，对于许多前向扩散过程，反向扩散过程可以用相同的函数形式描述。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Binary sequence learning via binomial diffusion. A binomial diffusion model was trained on binary ‘heartbeat’ data, where a pulse occurs every 5th bin. Generated samples (left) are identical to the training data. The sampling procedure consists of initialization at independent binomial noise (right), which is then transformed into the data distribution by a binomial diffusion process, with trained bit flip probabilities. Each row contains an independent sample. For ease of visualization, all samples have been shifted so that a pulse occurs in the first column. In the raw sequence data, the first pulse is uniformly distributed over the first five bins.
items.capZh: 图2：通过二项扩散进行二进制序列学习。在二进制“心跳”数据上训练二项扩散模型，其中每第5个 bin 出现一个脉冲。生成的样本（左）与训练数据相同。采样过程包括在独立二项噪声（右）中初始化，然后通过具有训练好的比特翻转概率的二项扩散过程将其转换为数据分布。每一行包含一个独立样本。为了便于可视化，所有样本都已移动，使得脉冲出现在第一列。在原始序列数据中，第一个脉冲均匀分布在前五个 bin 上。

items.en: Our goal is to define a forward (or inference) diffusion process which converts any complex data distribution into a simple, tractable, distribution, and then learn a finite-time reversal of this diffusion process which defines our generative model distribution (See Figure 1). We first describe the forward, inference diffusion process. We then show how the reverse, generative diffusion process can be trained and used to evaluate probabilities. We also derive entropy bounds for the reverse process, and show how the learned distributions can be multiplied by any second distribution (e.g. as would be done to compute a posterior when inpainting or denoising an image).
items.zh: 我们的目标是定义一个前向（或推理）扩散过程，该过程将任意复杂的数据分布转化为简单、易处理的分布，然后学习该扩散过程的有限时间反转，从而定义我们的生成模型分布（见图1）。我们首先描述前向推理扩散过程，然后展示如何训练反向生成扩散过程并用于评估概率。我们还推导了反向过程的熵界，并展示了如何将学习到的分布与任何第二分布相乘（例如，在图像修复或去噪时计算后验概率）。

items.en: We label the data distribution q​(𝐱(0))𝑞superscript𝐱0q\left(\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right). The data distribution is gradually converted into a well behaved (analytically tractable) distribution π​(𝐲)𝜋𝐲\pi\left(\mathbf{y}\right) by repeated application of a Markov diffusion kernel Tπ​(𝐲|𝐲′;β)subscript𝑇𝜋conditional𝐲superscript𝐲′𝛽T_{\pi}\left(\mathbf{y}|\mathbf{y}^{\prime};\beta\right) for π​(𝐲)𝜋𝐲\pi\left(\mathbf{y}\right), where β𝛽\beta is the diffusion rate,
items.zh: 我们将数据分布标记为 q(𝐱(0))。通过重复应用针对 π(𝐲) 的马尔可夫扩散核 Tπ(𝐲|𝐲′;β)，数据分布逐渐转化为一个行为良好（解析易处理）的分布 π(𝐲)，其中 β 是扩散速率。

items.en: The forward trajectory, corresponding to starting at the data distribution and performing T𝑇T steps of diffusion, is thus
items.zh: 前向轨迹对应于从数据分布开始并执行 T 步扩散，因此为：

items.en: For the experiments shown below, q​(𝐱(t)|𝐱(t−1))𝑞conditionalsuperscript𝐱𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡1q\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}|\mathbf{x}^{(t-1)}\right) corresponds to either Gaussian diffusion into a Gaussian distribution with identity-covariance, or binomial diffusion into an independent binomial distribution. Table App.1 gives the diffusion kernels for both Gaussian and binomial distributions.
items.zh: 在以下实验中，q(𝐱(t)|𝐱(t-1)) 对应于高斯扩散（进入具有单位协方差的高斯分布）或二项扩散（进入独立二项分布）。表 App.1 给出了高斯和二项分布的扩散核。

items.en: The generative distribution will be trained to describe the same trajectory, but in reverse,
items.zh: 生成分布将被训练来描述相同的轨迹，但方向相反：

items.en: For both Gaussian and binomial diffusion, for continuous diffusion (limit of small step size β𝛽\beta) the reversal of the diffusion process has the identical functional form as the forward process (Feller, 1949). Since q​(𝐱(t)|𝐱(t−1))𝑞conditionalsuperscript𝐱𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡1q\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}|\mathbf{x}^{(t-1)}\right) is a Gaussian (binomial) distribution, and if βtsubscript𝛽𝑡\beta_{t} is small, then q​(𝐱(t−1)|𝐱(t))𝑞conditionalsuperscript𝐱𝑡1superscript𝐱𝑡q\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t-1)}|\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\right) will also be a Gaussian (binomial) distribution. The longer the trajectory the smaller the diffusion rate β𝛽\beta can be made.
items.zh: 对于高斯和二项扩散，在连续扩散（小步长 β 的极限）下，扩散过程的反转具有与前向过程相同的函数形式（Feller, 1949）。由于 q(𝐱(t)|𝐱(t-1)) 是高斯（二项）分布，且如果 βt 很小，则 q(𝐱(t-1)|𝐱(t)) 也将是高斯（二项）分布。轨迹越长，扩散速率 β 可以越小。

items.en: During learning only the mean and covariance for a Gaussian diffusion kernel, or the bit flip probability for a binomial kernel, need be estimated. As shown in Table App.1, 𝐟μ​(𝐱(t),t)subscript𝐟𝜇superscript𝐱𝑡𝑡\mathbf{f}_{\mu}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)},t\right) and 𝐟Σ​(𝐱(t),t)subscript𝐟Σsuperscript𝐱𝑡𝑡\mathbf{f}_{\Sigma}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)},t\right) are functions defining the mean and covariance of the reverse Markov transitions for a Gaussian, and 𝐟b​(𝐱(t),t)subscript𝐟𝑏superscript𝐱𝑡𝑡\mathbf{f}_{b}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)},t\right) is a function providing the bit flip probability for a binomial distribution. The computational cost of running this algorithm is the cost of these functions, times the number of time-steps. For all results in this paper, multi-layer perceptrons are used to define these functions. A wide range of regression or function fitting techniques would be applicable however, including nonparameteric methods.
items.zh: 在学习过程中，只需估计高斯扩散核的均值和协方差，或二项核的比特翻转概率。如表 App.1 所示，𝐟μ(𝐱(t),t) 和 𝐟Σ(𝐱(t),t) 是定义高斯反向马尔可夫转移均值和协方差的函数，而 𝐟b(𝐱(t),t) 是提供二项分布比特翻转概率的函数。运行该算法的计算成本是这些函数的成本乘以时间步数。对于本文的所有结果，使用多层感知机来定义这些函数。然而，广泛的回归或函数拟合技术都适用，包括非参数方法。

items.en: The probability the generative model assigns to the data is
items.zh: 生成模型分配给数据的概率为：

items.en: Naively this integral is intractable – but taking a cue from annealed importance sampling and the Jarzynski equality, we instead evaluate the relative probability of the forward and reverse trajectories, averaged over forward trajectories,
items.zh: 直观上，这个积分是难以处理的——但借鉴退火重要性采样和 Jarzynski 等式的思路，我们转而评估前向和反向轨迹的相对概率，并对前向轨迹取平均：

items.en: This can be evaluated rapidly by averaging over samples from the forward trajectory q​(𝐱(1​⋯​T)|𝐱(0))𝑞conditionalsuperscript𝐱1⋯𝑇superscript𝐱0q\left(\mathbf{x}^{(1\cdots T)}|\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right). For infinitesimal β𝛽\beta the forward and reverse distribution over trajectories can be made identical (see Section 2.2). If they are identical then only a single sample from q​(𝐱(1​⋯​T)|𝐱(0))𝑞conditionalsuperscript𝐱1⋯𝑇superscript𝐱0q\left(\mathbf{x}^{(1\cdots T)}|\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right) is required to exactly evaluate the above integral, as can be seen by substitution. This corresponds to the case of a quasi-static process in statistical physics (Spinney & Ford, 2013; Jarzynski, 2011).
items.zh: 这可以通过对前向轨迹 q(𝐱(1⋯T)|𝐱(0)) 的样本取平均来快速评估。对于无穷小的 β，前向和反向轨迹分布可以变得相同（见第 2.2 节）。如果它们相同，则只需从 q(𝐱(1⋯T)|𝐱(0)) 中抽取一个样本即可精确评估上述积分，这可以通过代入看出。这对应于统计物理学中的准静态过程（Spinney & Ford, 2013; Jarzynski, 2011）。

items.en: Training amounts to maximizing the model log likelihood,
items.zh: 训练相当于最大化模型对数似然：

items.en: which has a lower bound provided by Jensen’s inequality,
items.zh: 其下界由 Jensen 不等式给出：

items.en: As described in Appendix B, for our diffusion trajectories this reduces to,
items.zh: 如附录 B 所述，对于我们的扩散轨迹，这简化为：

items.en: where the entropies and KL divergences can be analytically computed. The derivation of this bound parallels the derivation of the log likelihood bound in variational Bayesian methods.
items.zh: 其中熵和 KL 散度可以解析计算。该下界的推导与变分贝叶斯方法中对数似然下界的推导类似。

items.en: As in Section 2.3 if the forward and reverse trajectories are identical, corresponding to a quasi-static process, then the inequality in Equation 15 becomes an equality.
items.zh: 如第 2.3 节所述，如果前向和反向轨迹相同（对应于准静态过程），则公式 15 中的不等式变为等式。

items.en: Training consists of finding the reverse Markov transitions which maximize this lower bound on the log likelihood,
items.zh: 训练包括寻找最大化对数似然下界的反向马尔可夫转移：

items.en: The specific targets of estimation for Gaussian and binomial diffusion are given in Table App.1.
items.zh: 高斯和二项扩散的具体估计目标见表 App.1。

items.en: Thus, the task of estimating a probability distribution has been reduced to the task of performing regression on the functions which set the mean and covariance of a sequence of Gaussians (or set the state flip probability for a sequence of Bernoulli trials).
items.zh: 因此，估计概率分布的任务已简化为对设定一系列高斯分布的均值和协方差（或设定一系列伯努利试验的状态翻转概率）的函数进行回归的任务。

items.en: The choice of βtsubscript𝛽𝑡\beta_{t} in the forward trajectory is important for the performance of the trained model. In AIS, the right schedule of intermediate distributions can greatly improve the accuracy of the log partition function estimate (Grosse et al., 2013). In thermodynamics the schedule taken when moving between equilibrium distributions determines how much free energy is lost (Spinney & Ford, 2013; Jarzynski, 2011).
items.zh: 前向轨迹中 βt 的选择对训练模型的性能至关重要。在 AIS 中，正确的中间分布调度可以大大提高对数配分函数估计的准确性（Grosse et al., 2013）。在热力学中，在平衡分布之间移动时的调度决定了损失多少自由能（Spinney & Ford, 2013; Jarzynski, 2011）。

items.en: In the case of Gaussian diffusion, we learn222Recent experiments suggest that it is just as effective to instead use the same fixed βtsubscript𝛽𝑡\beta_{t} schedule as for binomial diffusion. the forward diffusion schedule β2​⋯​Tsubscript𝛽2⋯𝑇\beta_{2\cdots T} by gradient ascent on K𝐾K. The variance β1subscript𝛽1\beta_{1} of the first step is fixed to a small constant to prevent overfitting. The dependence of samples from q​(𝐱(1​⋯​T)|𝐱(0))𝑞conditionalsuperscript𝐱1⋯𝑇superscript𝐱0q\left(\mathbf{x}^{(1\cdots T)}|\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right) on β1​⋯​Tsubscript𝛽1⋯𝑇\beta_{1\cdots T} is made explicit by using ‘frozen noise’ – as in (Kingma & Welling, 2013) the noise is treated as an additional auxiliary variable, and held constant while computing partial derivatives of K𝐾K with respect to the parameters.
items.zh: 在高斯扩散的情况下，我们通过梯度上升法在 K 上学习前向扩散调度 β2⋯T。第一步的方差 β1 固定为一个小常数以防止过拟合。通过使用“冻结噪声”明确 q(𝐱(1⋯T)|𝐱(0)) 样本对 β1⋯T 的依赖性——如 (Kingma & Welling, 2013) 中所述，噪声被视为额外的辅助变量，并在计算 K 对参数的偏导数时保持不变。

items.en: For binomial diffusion, the discrete state space makes gradient ascent with frozen noise impossible. We instead choose the forward diffusion schedule β1​⋯​Tsubscript𝛽1⋯𝑇\beta_{1\cdots T} to erase a constant fraction 1T1𝑇\frac{1}{T} of the original signal per diffusion step, yielding a diffusion rate of βt=(T−t+1)−1subscript𝛽𝑡superscript𝑇𝑡11\beta_{t}=\left(T-t+1\right)^{-1}.
items.zh: 对于二项扩散，离散状态空间使得使用冻结噪声进行梯度上升不可行。我们转而选择前向扩散调度 β₁⋯T，在每个扩散步骤中擦除原始信号的恒定分数 1/T，从而得到扩散率 β_t = (T - t + 1)⁻¹。

items.en: Tasks such as computing a posterior in order to do signal denoising or inference of missing values requires multiplication of the model distribution p​(𝐱(0))𝑝superscript𝐱0p\left(\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right) with a second distribution, or bounded positive function, r​(𝐱(0))𝑟superscript𝐱0r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right), producing a new distribution p~​(𝐱(0))∝p​(𝐱(0))​r​(𝐱(0))proportional-to~𝑝superscript𝐱0𝑝superscript𝐱0𝑟superscript𝐱0\tilde{p}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right)\propto p\left(\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right)r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right).
items.zh: 诸如计算后验以进行信号去噪或缺失值推断等任务，需要将模型分布 p(x^(0)) 与第二个分布或有界正函数 r(x^(0)) 相乘，产生新分布 p̃(x^(0)) ∝ p(x^(0)) r(x^(0))。

items.en: Multiplying distributions is costly and difficult for many techniques, including variational autoencoders, GSNs, NADEs, and most graphical models. However, under a diffusion model it is straightforward, since the second distribution can be treated either as a small perturbation to each step in the diffusion process, or often exactly multiplied into each diffusion step. Figures 3 and 5 demonstrate the use of a diffusion model to perform denoising and inpainting of natural images. The following sections describe how to multiply distributions in the context of diffusion probabilistic models.
items.zh: 对于许多技术（包括变分自编码器、GSN、NADE 和大多数图模型）而言，分布相乘代价高昂且困难。然而，在扩散模型下，这很简单，因为第二个分布可以被视为扩散过程中每一步的小扰动，或者通常可以直接乘入每个扩散步骤。图 3 和图 5 展示了使用扩散模型对自然图像进行去噪和修复。以下各节描述了如何在扩散概率模型的背景下进行分布相乘。

items.en: First, in order to compute p~​(𝐱(0))~𝑝superscript𝐱0\tilde{p}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right), we multiply each of the intermediate distributions by a corresponding function r​(𝐱(t))𝑟superscript𝐱𝑡r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\right). We use a tilde above a distribution or Markov transition to denote that it belongs to a trajectory that has been modified in this way. p~​(𝐱(0​⋯​T))~𝑝superscript𝐱0⋯𝑇\tilde{p}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(0\cdots T)}\right) is the modified reverse trajectory, which starts at the distribution p~​(𝐱(T))=1Z~T​p​(𝐱(T))​r​(𝐱(T))~𝑝superscript𝐱𝑇1subscript~𝑍𝑇𝑝superscript𝐱𝑇𝑟superscript𝐱𝑇\tilde{p}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(T)}\right)=\frac{1}{\tilde{Z}_{T}}p\left(\mathbf{x}^{(T)}\right)r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(T)}\right) and proceeds through the sequence of intermediate distributions
items.zh: 首先，为了计算 p̃(x^(0))，我们将每个中间分布乘以相应的函数 r(x^(t))。我们在分布或马尔可夫转移上方使用波浪线表示它属于以这种方式修改的轨迹。p̃(x^(0⋯T)) 是修改后的反向轨迹，从分布 p̃(x^(T)) = (1/Z̃_T) p(x^(T)) r(x^(T)) 开始，并通过中间分布序列进行，

items.en: where Z~tsubscript~𝑍𝑡\tilde{Z}_{t} is the normalizing constant for the t𝑡tth intermediate distribution.
items.zh: 其中 Z̃_t 是第 t 个中间分布的归一化常数。

items.en: The Markov kernel p​(𝐱(t)∣𝐱(t+1))𝑝conditionalsuperscript𝐱𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡1p\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\mid\mathbf{x}^{(t+1)}\right) for the reverse diffusion process obeys the equilibrium condition
items.zh: 反向扩散过程的马尔可夫核 p(x^(t) | x^(t+1)) 满足平衡条件

items.en: We wish the perturbed Markov kernel p~​(𝐱(t)∣𝐱(t+1))~𝑝conditionalsuperscript𝐱𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡1\tilde{p}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\mid\mathbf{x}^{(t+1)}\right) to instead obey the equilibrium condition for the perturbed distribution,
items.zh: 我们希望扰动后的马尔可夫核 p̃(x^(t) | x^(t+1)) 满足扰动分布的平衡条件，

items.en: Equation 23 may not correspond to a normalized probability distribution, so we choose p~​(𝐱(t)|𝐱(t+1))~𝑝conditionalsuperscript𝐱𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡1\tilde{p}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}|\mathbf{x}^{(t+1)}\right) to be the corresponding normalized distribution
items.zh: 方程 23 可能不对应于归一化的概率分布，因此我们选择 p̃(x^(t) | x^(t+1)) 为相应的归一化分布

items.en: where Z~t​(𝐱(t+1))subscript~𝑍𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡1\tilde{Z}_{t}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t+1)}\right) is the normalization constant.
items.zh: 其中 Z̃_t(x^(t+1)) 是归一化常数。

items.en: For a Gaussian, each diffusion step is typically very sharply peaked relative to r​(𝐱(t))𝑟superscript𝐱𝑡r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\right), due to its small variance. This means that r​(𝐱(t))r​(𝐱(t+1))𝑟superscript𝐱𝑡𝑟superscript𝐱𝑡1\frac{r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\right)}{r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t+1)}\right)} can be treated as a small perturbation to p​(𝐱(t)|𝐱(t+1))𝑝conditionalsuperscript𝐱𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡1p\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}|\mathbf{x}^{(t+1)}\right). A small perturbation to a Gaussian effects the mean, but not the normalization constant, so in this case Equations 23 and 24 are equivalent (see Appendix C).
items.zh: 对于高斯分布，由于方差小，每个扩散步骤通常相对于 r(x^(t)) 非常尖锐。这意味着 r(x^(t)) / r(x^(t+1)) 可以被视为对 p(x^(t) | x^(t+1)) 的小扰动。对高斯分布的小扰动影响均值，但不影响归一化常数，因此在这种情况下方程 23 和 24 是等价的（见附录 C）。

items.en: If r​(𝐱(t))𝑟superscript𝐱𝑡r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\right) is sufficiently smooth, then it can be treated as a small perturbation to the reverse diffusion kernel p​(𝐱(t)|𝐱(t+1))𝑝conditionalsuperscript𝐱𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡1p\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}|\mathbf{x}^{(t+1)}\right). In this case p~​(𝐱(t)|𝐱(t+1))~𝑝conditionalsuperscript𝐱𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡1\tilde{p}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}|\mathbf{x}^{(t+1)}\right) will have an identical functional form to p​(𝐱(t)|𝐱(t+1))𝑝conditionalsuperscript𝐱𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡1p\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}|\mathbf{x}^{(t+1)}\right), but with perturbed mean for the Gaussian kernel, or with perturbed flip rate for the binomial kernel. The perturbed diffusion kernels are given in Table App.1, and are derived for the Gaussian in Appendix C.
items.zh: 如果 r(x^(t)) 足够平滑，那么它可以被视为对反向扩散核 p(x^(t) | x^(t+1)) 的小扰动。在这种情况下，p̃(x^(t) | x^(t+1)) 将具有与 p(x^(t) | x^(t+1)) 相同的函数形式，但高斯核的均值或二项核的翻转率受到扰动。扰动后的扩散核在表 App.1 中给出，并在附录 C 中针对高斯分布进行了推导。

items.en: If r​(𝐱(t))𝑟superscript𝐱𝑡r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\right) can be multiplied with a Gaussian (or binomial) distribution in closed form, then it can be directly multiplied with the reverse diffusion kernel p​(𝐱(t)|𝐱(t+1))𝑝conditionalsuperscript𝐱𝑡superscript𝐱𝑡1p\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}|\mathbf{x}^{(t+1)}\right) in closed form. This applies in the case where r​(𝐱(t))𝑟superscript𝐱𝑡r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\right) consists of a delta function for some subset of coordinates, as in the inpainting example in Figure 5.
items.zh: 如果 r(x^(t)) 可以与高斯（或二项）分布以闭式相乘，那么它可以直接与反向扩散核 p(x^(t) | x^(t+1)) 以闭式相乘。这适用于 r(x^(t)) 由某些坐标子集的 delta 函数组成的情况，如图 5 中的修复示例所示。

items.en: Typically, r​(𝐱(t))𝑟superscript𝐱𝑡r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\right) should be chosen to change slowly over the course of the trajectory. For the experiments in this paper we chose it to be constant,
items.zh: 通常，应选择 r(x^(t)) 在轨迹过程中缓慢变化。对于本文的实验，我们选择其为常数，

items.en: Another convenient choice is r​(𝐱(t))=r​(𝐱(0))T−tT𝑟superscript𝐱𝑡𝑟superscriptsuperscript𝐱0𝑇𝑡𝑇r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\right)=r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right)^{\frac{T-t}{T}}. Under this second choice r​(𝐱(t))𝑟superscript𝐱𝑡r\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)}\right) makes no contribution to the starting distribution for the reverse trajectory. This guarantees that drawing the initial sample from p~​(𝐱(T))~𝑝superscript𝐱𝑇\tilde{p}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(T)}\right) for the reverse trajectory remains straightforward.
items.zh: 另一个方便的选择是 r(x^(t)) = r(x^(0))^{(T-t)/T}。在这种选择下，r(x^(t)) 对反向轨迹的起始分布没有贡献。这保证了从 p̃(x^(T)) 为反向轨迹抽取初始样本仍然简单。

items.en: Since the forward process is known, we can derive upper and lower bounds on the conditional entropy of each step in the reverse trajectory, and thus on the log likelihood,
items.zh: 由于前向过程已知，我们可以推导出反向轨迹中每一步的条件熵的上下界，从而推导出对数似然的上下界，

items.en: where both the upper and lower bounds depend only on q​(𝐱(1​⋯​T)|𝐱(0))𝑞conditionalsuperscript𝐱1⋯𝑇superscript𝐱0q\left(\mathbf{x}^{(1\cdots T)}|\mathbf{x}^{(0)}\right), and can be analytically computed. The derivation is provided in Appendix A.
items.zh: 其中上下界仅依赖于 q(x^(1⋯T) | x^(0))，并且可以解析计算。推导过程在附录 A 中提供。

items.en: We train diffusion probabilistic models on a variety of continuous datasets, and a binary dataset. We then demonstrate sampling from the trained model and inpainting of missing data, and compare model performance against other techniques. In all cases the objective function and gradient were computed using Theano (Bergstra & Breuleux, 2010). Model training was with SFO (Sohl-Dickstein et al., 2014), except for CIFAR-10. CIFAR-10 results used the open source implementation of the algorithm, and RMSprop for optimization. The lower bound on the log likelihood provided by our model is reported for all datasets in Table 1. A reference implementation of the algorithm utilizing Blocks (van Merriënboer et al., 2015) is available at https://github.com/Sohl-Dickstein/Diffusion-Probabilistic-Models.
items.zh: 我们在多个连续数据集和一个二值数据集上训练扩散概率模型。然后，我们演示了从训练模型中采样和缺失数据的修复，并将模型性能与其他技术进行了比较。在所有情况下，目标函数和梯度均使用 Theano（Bergstra & Breuleux, 2010）计算。模型训练使用 SFO（Sohl-Dickstein et al., 2014），CIFAR-10 除外。CIFAR-10 结果使用了该算法的开源实现和 RMSprop 进行优化。我们的模型提供的对数似然下界在表 1 中针对所有数据集进行了报告。使用 Blocks（van Merriënboer et al., 2015）的算法参考实现可在 https://github.com/Sohl-Dickstein/Diffusion-Probabilistic-Models 获取。

items.en: A diffusion probabilistic model was built of a two dimensional swiss roll distribution, using a radial basis function network to generate 𝐟μ​(𝐱(t),t)subscript𝐟𝜇superscript𝐱𝑡𝑡\mathbf{f}_{\mu}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)},t\right) and 𝐟Σ​(𝐱(t),t)subscript𝐟Σsuperscript𝐱𝑡𝑡\mathbf{f}_{\Sigma}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)},t\right). As illustrated in Figure 1, the swiss roll distribution was successfully learned. See Appendix Section D.1.1 for more details.
items.zh: 构建了一个二维瑞士卷分布的扩散概率模型，使用径向基函数网络生成 f_μ(x^(t), t) 和 f_Σ(x^(t), t)。如图 1 所示，成功学习了瑞士卷分布。更多细节见附录 D.1.1 节。

items.en: A diffusion probabilistic model was trained on simple binary sequences of length 20, where a 1 occurs every 5th time bin, and the remainder of the bins are 0, using a multi-layer perceptron to generate the Bernoulli rates 𝐟b​(𝐱(t),t)subscript𝐟𝑏superscript𝐱𝑡𝑡\mathbf{f}_{b}\left(\mathbf{x}^{(t)},t\right) of the reverse trajectory. The log likelihood under the true distribution is log2⁡(15)=−2.322subscript2152.322\log_{2}\left(\frac{1}{5}\right)=-2.322 bits per sequence. As can be seen in Figure 2 and Table 1 learning was nearly perfect. See Appendix Section D.1.2 for more details.
items.zh: 在长度为 20 的简单二值序列上训练了扩散概率模型，其中每第 5 个时间仓出现 1，其余仓为 0，使用多层感知器生成反向轨迹的伯努利率 f_b(x^(t), t)。真实分布下的对数似然为 log₂(1/5) = -2.322 比特每序列。如图 2 和表 1 所示，学习近乎完美。更多细节见附录 D.1.2 节。

items.en: We trained Gaussian diffusion probabilistic models on several image datasets. The multi-scale convolutional architecture shared by these experiments is described in Appendix Section D.2.1, and illustrated in Figure D.1.
items.zh: 我们在多个图像数据集上训练了高斯扩散概率模型。这些实验共享的多尺度卷积架构在附录 D.2.1 节中描述，并在图 D.1 中展示。

items.en: In order to allow a direct comparison against previous work on a simple dataset, we trained on MNIST digits (LeCun & Cortes, 1998). Log likelihoods relative to (Bengio et al., 2012; Bengio & Thibodeau-Laufer, 2013; Goodfellow et al., 2014) are given in Table 2. Samples from the MNIST model are given in Appendix Figure App.1. Our training algorithm provides an asymptotically consistent lower bound on the log likelihood. However most previous reported results on continuous MNIST log likelihood rely on Parzen-window based estimates computed from model samples. For this comparison we therefore estimate MNIST log likelihood using the Parzen-window code released with (Goodfellow et al., 2014).
items.zh: 为了与先前在简单数据集上的工作直接比较，我们在MNIST数字上进行了训练（LeCun & Cortes, 1998）。相对于（Bengio et al., 2012; Bengio & Thibodeau-Laufer, 2013; Goodfellow et al., 2014）的对数似然值见表2。MNIST模型的样本见附录图App.1。我们的训练算法提供了对数似然的渐近一致下界。然而，先前大多数关于连续MNIST对数似然的报告结果依赖于基于模型样本的Parzen窗估计。因此，为了进行比较，我们使用（Goodfellow et al., 2014）发布的Parzen窗代码估计了MNIST的对数似然。

items.en: A probabilistic model was fit to the training images for the CIFAR-10 challenge dataset (Krizhevsky & Hinton, 2009). Samples from the trained model are provided in Figure 3.
items.zh: 针对CIFAR-10挑战数据集（Krizhevsky & Hinton, 2009），我们拟合了一个概率模型到训练图像上。训练模型的样本见图3。

items.en: Dead leaf images (Jeulin, 1997; Lee et al., 2001) consist of layered occluding circles, drawn from a power law distribution over scales. They have an analytically tractable structure, but capture many of the statistical complexities of natural images, and therefore provide a compelling test case for natural image models. As illustrated in Table 2 and Figure 4, we achieve state of the art performance on the dead leaves dataset.
items.zh: 枯叶图像（Jeulin, 1997; Lee et al., 2001）由分层遮挡的圆形组成，这些圆形从尺度上的幂律分布中抽取。它们具有解析上可处理的结构，但捕捉了自然图像的许多统计复杂性，因此为自然图像模型提供了一个引人注目的测试案例。如表2和图4所示，我们在枯叶数据集上达到了最先进的性能。

items.en: A probabilistic model was trained on bark texture images (T01-T04) from (Lazebnik et al., 2005). For this dataset we demonstrate that it is straightforward to evaluate or generate from a posterior distribution, by inpainting a large region of missing data using a sample from the model posterior in Figure 5.
items.zh: 针对（Lazebnik et al., 2005）中的树皮纹理图像（T01-T04），我们训练了一个概率模型。对于这个数据集，我们展示了通过从图5中的模型后验样本中修复一大块缺失数据，可以轻松地评估或从后验分布中生成。

items.en: We have introduced a novel algorithm for modeling probability distributions that enables exact sampling and evaluation of probabilities and demonstrated its effectiveness on a variety of toy and real datasets, including challenging natural image datasets. For each of these tests we used a similar basic algorithm, showing that our method can accurately model a wide variety of distributions. Most existing density estimation techniques must sacrifice modeling power in order to stay tractable and efficient, and sampling or evaluation are often extremely expensive. The core of our algorithm consists of estimating the reversal of a Markov diffusion chain which maps data to a noise distribution; as the number of steps is made large, the reversal distribution of each diffusion step becomes simple and easy to estimate. The result is an algorithm that can learn a fit to any data distribution, but which remains tractable to train, exactly sample from, and evaluate, and under which it is straightforward to manipulate conditional and posterior distributions.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的概率分布建模算法，该算法能够实现精确采样和概率评估，并在各种玩具和真实数据集（包括具有挑战性的自然图像数据集）上展示了其有效性。对于这些测试中的每一个，我们都使用了类似的基本算法，表明我们的方法可以准确地对各种分布进行建模。大多数现有的密度估计技术必须牺牲建模能力以保持可处理性和效率，并且采样或评估通常极其昂贵。我们算法的核心是估计将数据映射到噪声分布的马尔可夫扩散链的逆过程；随着步数的增加，每个扩散步骤的逆分布变得简单且易于估计。结果是一种算法，它可以学习拟合任何数据分布，同时保持训练的可处理性、精确采样和评估，并且在此算法下，操作条件和后验分布变得简单直接。

items.en: We thank Lucas Theis, Subhaneil Lahiri, Ben Poole, Diederik P. Kingma, Taco Cohen, Philip Bachman, and Aäron van den Oord for extremely helpful discussion, and Ian Goodfellow for Parzen-window code. We thank Khan Academy and the Office of Naval Research for funding Jascha Sohl-Dickstein, and we thank the Office of Naval Research and the Burroughs-Wellcome, Sloan, and James S. McDonnell foundations for funding Surya Ganguli.
items.zh: 我们感谢Lucas Theis、Subhaneil Lahiri、Ben Poole、Diederik P. Kingma、Taco Cohen、Philip Bachman和Aäron van den Oord非常有帮助的讨论，以及Ian Goodfellow提供的Parzen窗代码。我们感谢可汗学院和海军研究办公室对Jascha Sohl-Dickstein的资助，并感谢海军研究办公室以及Burroughs-Wellcome、Sloan和James S. McDonnell基金会对Surya Ganguli的资助。
